title: cyathea dorsalis
intro: Cyathea dorsalis, also known as the Queensland tree fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the Cyathea genus, native to Australia and New Caledonia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cyathea dorsalis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
